name: TrafficGuard
description: Click and install fraud prevention platform with real-time protection for Google Search, Meta and mobile UA campaigns.

seo.title: TrafficGuard — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: TrafficGuard: Click and install fraud prevention platform with real-time protection for Google Search, Meta and mobile UA campaigns.

when_to_use: Real-time click fraud prevention for Google Search campaigns
Invalid install detection for Meta and mobile UA campaigns
Pre-bid and post-bid ad fraud filtering for app UA teams

pros: Real-time click and install fraud prevention
Integrations with Google Search and Meta
cons: Not a full MMP on its own
Pricing climbs fast at higher volumes
Coverage weaker for niche ad networks
review.verdict: Effective pre-bid and post-bid fraud layer for PPC and UA, but expect to pair it with an MMP.
review.best_for: Performance marketers protecting Google Search, Meta and mobile UA from click and install fraud.
review.not_for: Teams that want a single-vendor MMP plus fraud stack instead of two tools.
